title: The Twenty Doctors Are Gathered
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on the twenty doctors are gathered, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Twenty Doctors Are Gathered. Hiriluk faces Wapol’s deception and declares that people live on through their dreams before his final sacrifice. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: When his heart is pierced by a bullet?

dialogue.speaker: Twenty Doctors
dialogue.text: When he is inflicted with an incurable disease?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even if I'm gone, my dream will come true.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The sick hearts of this country's citizens too will be saved...!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Can the same be said for the country as well...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As long as there are those to inherit the will...

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Bahahaha! The heck are you crying for, dalton!?

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: A monster shall soon come here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So don't lay a hand upon him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I WON'T DIE FROM YOUR mUSHROOM...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What a spec- Tacular life it's been!

summary: This part highlights the twenty doctors are gathered and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
